ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was made */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the membership plan associated with the transaction */,
  "contract_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contract type associated with the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee who processed the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, Cash, PayPal) */,
  "is_tax_exempt" INTEGER /* Indicates if the transaction is tax-exempt */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Additional discount amount applied to the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_contract_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_type_id") REFERENCES contract_types ("contract_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the store is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the store is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the store is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the store */,
  "store_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the store */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date the store opened */,
  "store_type" TEXT /* Type of store (e.g., Flagship, Outlet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_store_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the membership plan (e.g., Bronze, Silver, Gold) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the membership plan */,
  "discount_rate" REAL /* Discount rate offered by the plan */,
  "validity_period" TEXT /* Validity period of the plan */,
  "renewal_discount_rate" REAL /* Discount rate for renewing the plan */,
  "max_discount" REAL /* Maximum discount allowed for the plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_types" (
  "contract_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract type */,
  "contract_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the contract type (e.g., Existing, New) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contract type */,
  "is_renewable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the contract is renewable */,
  "renewal_fee" REAL /* Fee associated with renewing the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer is located */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the membership */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the membership plan of the customer */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the customer joined */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Income range of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer preference */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "communication_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of communication (e.g., Email, SMS) */,
  "preferred_store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the preferred store */,
  "marketing_opt_in" INTEGER /* Whether the customer opts in for marketing emails */,
  "preferred_payment_method" TEXT /* Customer's preferred payment method */,
  "preferred_product_category" TEXT /* Customer's preferred product category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_preferred_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_history" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Reference to the transaction */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the purchase */,
  "is_returned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the purchase was returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date of return if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_history_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_history_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Last date the stock was updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is currently active in the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, cashier, admin) */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the user works */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., transaction, customer) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales report */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the membership plan */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount */,
  "number_of_transactions" INTEGER /* Number of transactions */,
  "number_of_customers" INTEGER /* Number of unique customers in the report */,
  "average_transaction_value" REAL /* Average value of transactions */,
  "top_product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the top-selling product in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_top_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("top_product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id")
)
